original_statement: which episode was seen by more people, 1 or 5?
mutated_statement: which item was seen by more people, A or B, if A is required to be both seen by more people and seen by fewer people than B?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Identifier substitution + Logical-contradiction addition + Modality addition: "episode"→"item" | "1 or 5"→"A or B" | adds conditional requiring A to be both seen by more people and seen by fewer people than B (simple comparison→logically contradictory dual constraint) | adds "is required to be" (assertion→necessity).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令 - 逻辑解释合理化
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志中可识别出关键证据：agent 在 simple_query 中返回了 “Neither”（置信度1.0），并在 thought 与 judge_thought 中明确说明“条件要求 A 同时比 B 看过更多和更少，这是逻辑矛盾，无法满足”。agent 的具体表现为识别矛盾并直接通过逻辑推理解释不可成立（未尝试折中执行、未修改指令、也未向用户澄清），以事实/逻辑为依据拒绝给出可比答案。因此应归类为“逻辑解释合理化”，即通过推理指出矛盾并以此合理化输出。
